task_completion.description: Open the navigation drawer by tapping the hamburger menu.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A side navigation drawer is visible on the left side of the screen, overlaying the main Tasks screen.

task_completion.description: Locate the 'Share My Location' setting in the navigation drawer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Share My Location' is visible within the opened navigation drawer alongside a toggle switch.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Share My Location' toggle is initially in the ON position.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toggle switch next to 'Share My Location' is initially shown in the ON state (typically colored blue and positioned to the right).

task_completion.description: Turn the 'Share My Location' toggle OFF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The toggle switch next to 'Share My Location' changes to the OFF state (typically grayed out and positioned to the left).
The navigation drawer is no longer visible, and the main Tasks screen of the farmOS Field Kit app is fully visible without the overlay.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the farmOS Field Kit app interface and menus, not a terminal, command line, or script editor.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual farmOS Field Kit application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The toggle interaction occurs within the farmOS Field Kit app's navigation drawer, not in a mocked interface or Android system settings.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a text editor to simulate task completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no text editors or note-taking apps open displaying the expected state or task text.
